Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute near 63rd Street Beach
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding. Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Clinton and Polk
ShortDescription: Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between Clinton and Polk due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between Clinton and Polk due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

As a result, trains are operating only between 54th/Cermak and Racine at this time.

Shuttle buses are available from Clark/Lake to Polk to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Clinton and Clark/Lake
ShortDescription: Green Line service has been temporarily suspended between Clinton and Clark/Lake due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line service has been temporarily suspended between Clinton and Clark/Lake due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

As a result, trains are operating only between Harlem/Lake and Clinton at this time.

Shuttle buses are available from Clinton to Clark/Lake to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
